recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
recommendations.overview: When a nobleman is threatened by a family curse on his newly inherited estate, detective Sherlock Holmes is hired to investigate.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: Hidden
recommendations.overview: A family takes refuge in a fallout shelter to avoid a dangerous outbreak.

recommendations.title: Texas Killing Fields
recommendations.overview: In the Texas bayous, a local homicide detective teams up with a cop from New York City to investigate a series of unsolved murders.

recommendations.title: Shock
recommendations.overview: A couple is terrorized in their new house haunted by the vengeful ghost of the woman's former husband who possesses her young son.

recommendations.title: Burial Ground
recommendations.overview: A cursed country estate is besieged by horny houseguests, undead Etruscans, and the unusual relationship between a mother and her young son.

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.
